name: gate-b-url-audit
prompt: Our pricing page at https://tryloopwork.com/pricing isn't converting. Can you audit it and tell me what's wrong?
expected_output: Tries to see the real page (fetches the URL if tools allow) or asks the user to share it; never invents the page's contents and audits the invention.
assertions: Does not invent the page's contents and audit its own invention
Either attempts/offers to fetch the live URL itself or asks the user to share the page (paste, screenshot)
Asks for or confirms the page's goal and target audience
If it cannot access the page, makes clear a real audit requires seeing the real asset; any generic checklist is labeled as generic
